response.justification: Despite a strong overall software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrated professional C++ development experience on Windows and has no clear exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both of which are mandatory for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and is not tied to financial systems or Windows platforms.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern languages and architectures
Strong DevOps and CI/CD practices demonstrated across multiple roles
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lacks any documented domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial contexts
